en_title: Kratos is Out, Faye is In: God of War Laufey Creators Explain Why Kratos' Wife is the New Star
cn_title: 《战神》新作主角换人，奎托斯妻子菲登场
subtitle: 新战神登场
opus_summary: 在PlayStation State of Play发布会上，《战神》系列新作《战神：劳菲》正式公布，主角不再是奎托斯，而是他的妻子菲。圣莫妮卡工作室创意总监Cory Barlog和游戏总监Ariel Lawrence向IGN独家解释了这一决定：菲在2018年的《战神》中虽未露面但无处不在，新作将深入探索她的背景故事。战斗风格上，菲同样凶悍，融合了希腊和北欧时代的特色。目前游戏尚未公布发售日期。

paragraphs.en: The biggest news to come out of PlayStation's State of Play wasn't just that there was a new God of War game, but that Kratos was sitting this one out and his wife, Faye, was taking the starring role. God of War Laufey's game director Ariel Lawrence and Santa Monica Studio creative director Cory Barlog spoke exclusively to IGN ahead of the showcase to explain why.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation State of Play发布会上最重磅的消息，不仅是有《战神》新作，更是奎托斯这次退居幕后，由他的妻子菲担纲主角。《战神：劳菲》的游戏总监Ariel Lawrence和圣莫妮卡工作室创意总监Cory Barlog在发布会前独家向IGN解释了原因。

paragraphs.en: "We'll always tell stories about Kratos, but I think for us, it was just a chance to talk about somebody who was so pivotal to the beginning and get to know them and push beyond into this new world and give us some place to be surprised and see how things connect. So for us, it's not a departure; it's more of an expansion."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们永远会讲述奎托斯的故事，但对我们来说，这只是一个机会，去讲述一个对故事开端至关重要的人，去了解她，超越进入这个新世界，给我们一些惊喜，看看事物如何关联。所以对我们来说，这不是背离，而是一种扩展。」

paragraphs.en: Barlog explained that he knew way back in 2018 that Faye was a character that he knew he wanted to explore, and God of War Laufey is the way to do it. "The character to usher us into this sort of new world is this character, who is such an anchor to the rebirth of where we were going with the franchise."
paragraphs.cn: Barlog解释说，早在2018年他就知道菲是他想要探索的角色，而《战神：劳菲》正是实现这一目标的方式。「引领我们进入这个新世界的角色就是她，她是这个系列重生方向的锚点。」

paragraphs.en: He points out that Faye has been key to the recent games, even if she wasn't always front and center. "She was omnipresent but visually not represented. In 2018 she was a feeling; she was a phantom and a specter but one whose tendrils stretched out through the entirety of the narrative, and it gave her this interesting sense of power inside of it. It was like, man, it would be so interesting to see who she was before, but it also would be interesting to see how things continue forward."
paragraphs.cn: 他指出，菲在近几部游戏中一直很关键，尽管她并非总是处于中心位置。「她无处不在，但在视觉上并未呈现。在2018年的作品中，她是一种感觉；她是一个幻影、一个幽灵，但她的触角延伸至整个叙事，赋予她一种有趣的权力感。就像，天啊，看看她以前的样子会很有趣，但看看事情如何继续发展也很有趣。」

paragraphs.en: It's clear too in the footage shown, which represents the first 20 minutes of the game, and in the discussions with Lawrence and Barlog, that Faye is just as brutal as her hubby when it comes to combat.
paragraphs.cn: 从展示的片段（游戏前20分钟）以及与Lawrence和Barlog的讨论中可以明显看出，菲在战斗中和她的丈夫一样凶悍。

paragraphs.en: "Kratos is like a brick wall, and he's a little stoic, but it's just that his brutality is different," said Lawrence. "How do we show somebody who's his equal as she is? So when we looked, we got to think about all the [Santa Monica] games. The Greek era had an influence on Faye. The Norse era has an influence on Faye. So going to our more agile combat roots but also retaining our companions, our gritty closer combat. How do those marry together and then make something that's uniquely Faye-feeling while still being a Santa Monica game?"
paragraphs.cn: 「奎托斯就像一堵砖墙，他有点坚忍，但他的残暴是不同的，」Lawrence说。「我们如何展现一个与他势均力敌的人？所以当我们审视时，我们考虑了所有（圣莫妮卡）的游戏。希腊时代对菲有影响。北欧时代对菲也有影响。所以回归我们更敏捷的战斗根源，同时保留我们的同伴、我们gritty的近战。如何将这些融合在一起，创造出一种独特的菲的感觉，同时又是一款圣莫妮卡的游戏？」

paragraphs.en: There's no release date for the game just yet, but you can find out more in the full interview with Lawrence and Barlog on IGN.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏尚未公布发售日期，但你可以在IGN上查看对Lawrence和Barlog的完整采访，了解更多信息。

paragraphs.en: Rachel Weber is the Head of Editorial Development at IGN and an elder millennial. She's been a professional nerd since 2006 when she got her start on Official PlayStation Magazine in the UK, and has since worked for GamesIndustry.Biz, Rolling Stone and GamesRadar. She loves horror, horror movies, horror games, Red Dead Redemption 2, and her Love and Deepspace boyfriends.
paragraphs.cn: Rachel Weber是IGN的编辑发展主管，也是一位资深千禧一代。她从2006年开始成为职业玩家，最初在英国《官方PlayStation杂志》工作，之后先后供职于GamesIndustry.Biz、Rolling Stone和GamesRadar。她热爱恐怖、恐怖电影、恐怖游戏、《荒野大镖客：救赎2》以及她的《恋与深空》男友们。
